authority.componentSurface: Public declarations produced by the library build

statusDefinitions.stability: Verified stable, beta, or experimental classification.
statusDefinitions.documentationStatus: Generated or dedicated addressable documentation record.
statusDefinitions.auditStatus: Complete only when documentation, rendered preview, code, API, tests, accessibility, and category checks pass.
statusDefinitions.testStatus: Direct class reference in a canonical adjacent specification.
statusDefinitions.accessibilityStatus: Automated source-contract validation; not a conformance certification.
statusDefinitions.themeTokenSupport: Direct or inherited JRNG semantic-token coverage.
